_comment: Per-step cost budget for the core GNC loop (issue #53). Values are nanoseconds PER INTEGRATION STEP for runSimulation, measured by apps/bench (gncsim-bench) as the BEST (minimum) over many iterations. The CI perf job (.github/workflows/ci.yml -> perf-budget) FAILS if the measured best ns/step for a label exceeds budget * (1 + headroom). IMPORTANT: the gate runs on GitHub-hosted runners, ~2.5x slower than the dev host these were first profiled on, so these budgets are baselined to the CI runner scale (homing_3dof measured ~232 ns/step on CI). The 100% headroom flags genuine multi-x regressions (e.g. reverting frames.reserve()) rather than runner jitter. Re-baseline in the same change that justifies a regression.
